rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. MOBOLANLE ODULATE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 30, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT MOBOLANLE ODULATE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
